query:
-- Check failed pipeline run
SELECT id, status, startedAt, completedAt, durationMs, feedErrors
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE id = 2100001;

-- Check actual column name for digestSafe in projects
SHOW COLUMNS FROM projects LIKE '%igest%';

-- Check stale project count using lifecycleStatus
SELECT lifecycleStatus, suppressed, COUNT(*) as count
FROM projects
GROUP BY lifecycleStatus, suppressed
ORDER BY count DESC;
